name: frontend-slides-studio
description: Local-first agent skill, browser runtime, editor, diagram system, motion analyzer, and deterministic export pipeline for HTML presentations.

scripts.test: pnpm -r --if-present test && python3 -m unittest discover -s visual/tests -p 'test_*.py' && python3 -m unittest discover -s motion/test -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.check: pnpm check:registry-generated && pnpm check:diagram-gallery && pnpm check:skill && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm check:provenance && pnpm check:clean-room && pnpm check:integrations && pnpm check:legacy-drift
scripts.smoke:studio: pnpm --filter @slides-studio/protocol build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/quality build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/style-registry build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/diagram-kit build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/studio build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export-service exec node test/e2e-studio.mjs && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export-service exec node test/e2e-studio-launch.mjs
scripts.smoke:gallery: pnpm --filter @slides-studio/diagram-kit gallery && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export-service exec node test/e2e-diagram-gallery.mjs
scripts.smoke:asset: pnpm --filter @slides-studio/protocol build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/quality build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/style-registry build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/diagram-kit build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/media-kit build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/presentation-objects build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/studio build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export-service build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export-service exec node test/e2e-asset-studio.mjs
scripts.smoke:motion: pnpm --filter @slides-studio/protocol build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/runtime build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export-service exec node test/e2e-motion-transition.mjs
scripts.smoke:export: pnpm --filter @slides-studio/protocol build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/quality build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/media-kit build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/presentation-objects build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export-service build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export-service exec node test/e2e-export.mjs
scripts.smoke:editable: pnpm --filter @slides-studio/protocol build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/media-kit build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/presentation-objects build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export build && pnpm --filter @slides-studio/export-service exec node test/e2e-editable-pptx.mjs
scripts.smoke: pnpm smoke:studio && pnpm smoke:gallery && pnpm smoke:asset && pnpm smoke:motion && pnpm smoke:export && pnpm smoke:editable
